description_long: This object consists of three distinct pennants, each suspended from a horizontal wooden rod. The left pennant is green with a black tree silhouette and a double-pointed bottom edge, evoking a natural or environmental theme. The center pennant is red, narrow, and triangular, featuring a yellow flame or drop-like symbol in the middle, suggesting a motif of fire or energy. The right pennant is blue with a maroon shield, white stars, and wavy lines, giving it a heraldic or aquatic appearance. All three pennants are made of fabric and hang vertically from their rods, which are capped with round finials. The rods appear to be made of wood and are likely hollow to reduce weight. The pennants are visually distinct, each with its own color scheme and emblematic design.
description: A set of three hanging pennants, each with unique colors and emblems, suspended from wooden rods. Designs include a green tree, a red flame, and a blue shield with stars and waves.
description_view_0: Three pennants are visible from the front: green with a tree, red with a flame, and blue with a shield and stars, all hanging from wooden rods.
description_view_1: The pennants are seen edge-on, showing only the thin profile of the rods and a hint of the colored fabric below.
description_view_2: The pennants are shown from the back, with the blue shield, red flame, and green tree visible in reverse order.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, with the rods and a sliver of colored fabric visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Each pennant features a unique emblem: a black tree on green, a yellow flame on red, and a maroon shield with stars and wavy lines on blue. The designs are bold and symbolic, with no text present.
